creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Reopening, 
streamlink is now broken with this upgrade because it requires py-websocket-client 0.58 but only 0.56 is in the ports tree at this time. 

I suggest to attempt the fix by updating www/py-websocket-client, its update was submitted as https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=254563
